title: Fresh Rides Premium Car Care WooCommerce Concept
summary: A WooCommerce storefront concept for a premium car care brand, focused on landing-page clarity and eCommerce presentation.

metrics.label: WordPress and WooCommerce tags shown on Behance

challenge: Create a storefront concept that feels premium while staying easy to browse and merchandise.
approach: Focused the page structure around product storytelling and storefront clarity.
Designed a brand presentation that feels more elevated than a generic category page.
results: Serves as an early signal of Erroll’s interest in commerce-driven design, before later Shopify-heavy roles.

sections.heading: Why it is still relevant
paragraphs: Although this is an earlier concept project, it is useful in the portfolio because it shows that commerce presentation and product-first design were already part of the thinking before the more recent professional roles.
